description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and deb, both running on ubuntu-latest. The build job uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.x, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs pre-commit hooks, unit tests, CLI tests, and PyInstaller tests, and uploads the build artifact. The deb job checks out the code, verifies the Debian version, builds a .deb package, installs it, runs CLI tests, and uploads the Debian packages.
